Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
This week, the ship recycling markets across the major destinations continued to face a challenging environment. In India, the market remains sluggish with
low demand and limited tonnage availability, and no signs of recovery expected until after the monsoon season.
